info.description: The stable API for durable object storage and scoped access. Stored files do not expire when a transfer grant or public capability expires.
info.title: Blob Yard Core API

x-blobyard-mcp.excluded: MCP must not return a newly created bearer credential to model context.

200.description: Bootstrap authority exchanged once for a scoped local API token.

x-blobyard-mcp.excluded: Bootstrap credentials must never enter model context.

x-blobyard-cli.excluded: GitHub Actions exchanges its assertion directly.

x-blobyard-mcp.excluded: GitHub Actions exchanges its assertion directly.

x-blobyard-cli.excluded: Service readiness probe has no user workflow.

x-blobyard-mcp.excluded: Service readiness probe has no agent workflow.

x-blobyard-cli.excluded: The public capability URL resolves this operation.

x-blobyard-mcp.excluded: The public capability URL resolves this operation.

x-blobyard-cli.excluded: The public capability URL downloads this object.

x-blobyard-mcp.excluded: The public capability URL downloads this object.

x-blobyard-cli.excluded: The public capability URL resolves this operation.

x-blobyard-mcp.excluded: The public capability URL resolves this operation.

get.description: Lists active Web Yards for one workspace project.

post.description: Deletes a Web Yard and schedules retained manifest objects for cleanup. Workspace administrator access is required.

get.description: Lists the current deploy followed by retained deploy history.

post.description: Marks an incomplete deploy as failed and schedules its manifest for cleanup.
Snapshots a ready manifest and promotes it when no newer deploy has succeeded.
Creates or reuses a Web Yard and reserves a manifest root for a public deploy.
Promotes a retained successful deploy. Workspace administrator access is required.
